name: Boerenkass Soup (Dutch Cheese Soup)
recipeIngredient: 2 packets Instant Chicken Broth and Seasoning Mix
1 1/2 ounces Canadian-style bacon, cut into equal pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1 1/2-quart saucepan, heat one tablespoon margarine until bubbly.
2. Add onion and sauté until softened.
3. Add cauliflower, potato, and celeriac; sauté for 5 minutes.
4. Mix broth into water and add to the saucepan; stir to combine.
5. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low.
6. Cover and simmer until vegetables are tender, about 15 minutes.
7. In a small skillet, heat remaining margarine and sauté bacon until lightly browned.
8. Pour soup into two individual flameproof crocks or bowls.
9. Add one piece of bacon to each portion.
10. Top each with a toast slice and half the cheese.
11. Place under the broiler until cheese is bubbly, about 2 or 3 minutes.
12. Serve hot.
Makes 2 servings.
